result.stdout:
Description:
  Deploys an artifact to DataMiner.

Usage:
  Skyline.DataMiner.CICD.Tools.DataMinerDeploy [command] [options]

Options:
  --debug         Indicates the tool should write out debug logging.
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  from-artifact  Deploys a specific package from a local application package (.dmapp) or protocol package (.dmprotocol) to a DataMiner Agent. Warning: if using legacy application packages (.dmapp that you unzip, contains an Update.zip) the remote Agent will perform a restart.
  from-catalog   Deploys a specific package from the cloud to a cloud-connected DataMiner Agent.
  from-volatile  Deploys a specific package that was uploaded using the CatalogUpload tool without long-term registration on the Catalog (Volatile Upload) to a cloud-connected DataMiner Agent. Only supports private artifacts uploaded using a key from the specific agent (System Key).

commands.payload:
Description:
  Deploys an artifact to DataMiner.

Usage:
  Skyline.DataMiner.CICD.Tools.DataMinerDeploy [command] [options]

Options:
  --debug         Indicates the tool should write out debug logging.
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  from-artifact  Deploys a specific package from a local application package (.dmapp) or protocol package (.dmprotocol) to a DataMiner Agent. Warning: if using legacy application packages (.dmapp that you unzip, contains an Update.zip) the remote Agent will perform a restart.
  from-catalog   Deploys a specific package from the cloud to a cloud-connected DataMiner Agent.
  from-volatile  Deploys a specific package that was uploaded using the CatalogUpload tool without long-term registration on the Catalog (Volatile Upload) to a cloud-connected DataMiner Agent. Only supports private artifacts uploaded using a key from the specific agent (System Key).

result.stdout:
Description:
  Deploys a specific package from a local application package (.dmapp) or protocol package (.dmprotocol) to a DataMiner Agent. Warning: if using legacy application packages (.dmapp that you unzip, contains an Update.zip) the remote Agent will perform a restart.

Usage:
  Skyline.DataMiner.CICD.Tools.DataMinerDeploy from-artifact [options]

Options:
  --debug                                                                 Indicates the tool should write out debug logging.
  --path-to-artifact <path-to-artifact> (REQUIRED)                        Path to the application package (.dmapp) or protocol package (.dmprotocol).
  --dm-server-location <dm-server-location> (REQUIRED)                    The IP address or host name of the DataMiner Agent.
  --dm-user <dm-user>                                                     The DataMiner user to set up a direct connection to an accessible Agent. This is optional if the key can also be provided using the 'DATAMINER_DEPLOY_USER' environment variable (Unix/Windows) or using 'DATAMINER_DEPLOY_USER_ENCRYPTED' configured with Skyline.DataMiner.CICD.Tools.WinEncryptedKeys (Windows).
  --dm-password <dm-password>                                             The password to set up a direct connection to an accessible Agent. This is optional if the key can also be provided using the 'DATAMINER_DEPLOY_PASSWORD' environment variable (Unix/Windows) or using 'DATAMINER_DEPLOY_PASSWORD_ENCRYPTED' configured with Skyline.DataMiner.CICD.Tools.WinEncryptedKeys (Windows).
  --deploy-timeout-in-seconds <deploy-timeout-in-seconds>                 Timeout in seconds to wait on successful deployment. This is optional, if not provided this will be 15 minutes. Fill in 0 for infinite. [default: 900]
  --post-action <None|SetToProduction|SetToProductionIncludingTemplates>  Specify the post-action to perform. This only works for protocol packages (.dmprotocol). [default: None]
  -?, -h, --help                                                          Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Deploys a specific package from a local application package (.dmapp) or protocol package (.dmprotocol) to a DataMiner Agent. Warning: if using legacy application packages (.dmapp that you unzip, contains an Update.zip) the remote Agent will perform a restart.

Usage:
  Skyline.DataMiner.CICD.Tools.DataMinerDeploy from-artifact [options]

Options:
  --debug                                                                 Indicates the tool should write out debug logging.
  --path-to-artifact <path-to-artifact> (REQUIRED)                        Path to the application package (.dmapp) or protocol package (.dmprotocol).
  --dm-server-location <dm-server-location> (REQUIRED)                    The IP address or host name of the DataMiner Agent.
  --dm-user <dm-user>                                                     The DataMiner user to set up a direct connection to an accessible Agent. This is optional if the key can also be provided using the 'DATAMINER_DEPLOY_USER' environment variable (Unix/Windows) or using 'DATAMINER_DEPLOY_USER_ENCRYPTED' configured with Skyline.DataMiner.CICD.Tools.WinEncryptedKeys (Windows).
  --dm-password <dm-password>                                             The password to set up a direct connection to an accessible Agent. This is optional if the key can also be provided using the 'DATAMINER_DEPLOY_PASSWORD' environment variable (Unix/Windows) or using 'DATAMINER_DEPLOY_PASSWORD_ENCRYPTED' configured with Skyline.DataMiner.CICD.Tools.WinEncryptedKeys (Windows).
  --deploy-timeout-in-seconds <deploy-timeout-in-seconds>                 Timeout in seconds to wait on successful deployment. This is optional, if not provided this will be 15 minutes. Fill in 0 for infinite. [default: 900]
  --post-action <None|SetToProduction|SetToProductionIncludingTemplates>  Specify the post-action to perform. This only works for protocol packages (.dmprotocol). [default: None]
  -?, -h, --help                                                          Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Deploys a specific package from the cloud to a cloud-connected DataMiner Agent.

Usage:
  Skyline.DataMiner.CICD.Tools.DataMinerDeploy from-catalog [options]

Options:
  --debug                                                   Indicates the tool should write out debug logging.
  --catalog-id <catalog-id> (REQUIRED)                      The unique catalog artifact identifier. This is the catalog GUID of the item.
  --catalog-version <catalog-version> (REQUIRED)            The version of the catalog item you want to deploy.
  --agent-destination-id <agent-destination-id> (REQUIRED)  The destination agent ID to deploy to. To obtain this ID for an existing DataMiner System, navigate to its details page in the Admin app. The ID is the last GUID of the URL.
  --dm-catalog-token <dm-catalog-token>                     The organization key to deploy to a specific cloud-connected DataMiner as defined in admin.dataminer.services. This is optional if the key can also be provided using the 'DATAMINER_CATALOG_TOKEN' environment variable (Unix/Windows) or using 'DATAMINER_CATALOG_TOKEN_ENCRYPTED' configured with Skyline.DataMiner.CICD.Tools.WinEncryptedKeys (Windows).
  --deploy-timeout-in-seconds <deploy-timeout-in-seconds>   Timeout in seconds to wait on successful deployment. This is optional, if not provided this will be 15 minutes. Fill in 0 for infinite. [default: 900]
  -?, -h, --help                                            Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Deploys a specific package from the cloud to a cloud-connected DataMiner Agent.

Usage:
  Skyline.DataMiner.CICD.Tools.DataMinerDeploy from-catalog [options]

Options:
  --debug                                                   Indicates the tool should write out debug logging.
  --catalog-id <catalog-id> (REQUIRED)                      The unique catalog artifact identifier. This is the catalog GUID of the item.
  --catalog-version <catalog-version> (REQUIRED)            The version of the catalog item you want to deploy.
  --agent-destination-id <agent-destination-id> (REQUIRED)  The destination agent ID to deploy to. To obtain this ID for an existing DataMiner System, navigate to its details page in the Admin app. The ID is the last GUID of the URL.
  --dm-catalog-token <dm-catalog-token>                     The organization key to deploy to a specific cloud-connected DataMiner as defined in admin.dataminer.services. This is optional if the key can also be provided using the 'DATAMINER_CATALOG_TOKEN' environment variable (Unix/Windows) or using 'DATAMINER_CATALOG_TOKEN_ENCRYPTED' configured with Skyline.DataMiner.CICD.Tools.WinEncryptedKeys (Windows).
  --deploy-timeout-in-seconds <deploy-timeout-in-seconds>   Timeout in seconds to wait on successful deployment. This is optional, if not provided this will be 15 minutes. Fill in 0 for infinite. [default: 900]
  -?, -h, --help                                            Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Deploys a specific package that was uploaded using the CatalogUpload tool without long-term registration on the Catalog (Volatile Upload) to a cloud-connected DataMiner Agent. Only supports private artifacts uploaded using a key from the specific agent (System Key).

Usage:
  Skyline.DataMiner.CICD.Tools.DataMinerDeploy from-volatile [options]

Options:
  --debug                                                  Indicates the tool should write out debug logging.
  --artifact-id <artifact-id> (REQUIRED)                   The unique internal artifact identifier as returned from the CatalogUpload tool when performing a Volatile Upload.
  --dm-system-token <dm-system-token>                      The DataMiner System key to deploy to a specific cloud-connected DataMiner agent as defined in admin.dataminer.services for a specific Agent. This is optional if the key can also be provided using the 'DATAMINER_CATALOG_TOKEN' environment variable (Unix/Windows) or using 'DATAMINER_CATALOG_TOKEN_ENCRYPTED' configured with Skyline.DataMiner.CICD.Tools.WinEncryptedKeys (Windows).
  --deploy-timeout-in-seconds <deploy-timeout-in-seconds>  Timeout in seconds to wait on successful deployment. This is optional, if not provided this will be 15 minutes. Fill in 0 for infinite. [default: 900]
  -?, -h, --help                                           Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Deploys a specific package that was uploaded using the CatalogUpload tool without long-term registration on the Catalog (Volatile Upload) to a cloud-connected DataMiner Agent. Only supports private artifacts uploaded using a key from the specific agent (System Key).

Usage:
  Skyline.DataMiner.CICD.Tools.DataMinerDeploy from-volatile [options]

Options:
  --debug                                                  Indicates the tool should write out debug logging.
  --artifact-id <artifact-id> (REQUIRED)                   The unique internal artifact identifier as returned from the CatalogUpload tool when performing a Volatile Upload.
  --dm-system-token <dm-system-token>                      The DataMiner System key to deploy to a specific cloud-connected DataMiner agent as defined in admin.dataminer.services for a specific Agent. This is optional if the key can also be provided using the 'DATAMINER_CATALOG_TOKEN' environment variable (Unix/Windows) or using 'DATAMINER_CATALOG_TOKEN_ENCRYPTED' configured with Skyline.DataMiner.CICD.Tools.WinEncryptedKeys (Windows).
  --deploy-timeout-in-seconds <deploy-timeout-in-seconds>  Timeout in seconds to wait on successful deployment. This is optional, if not provided this will be 15 minutes. Fill in 0 for infinite. [default: 900]
  -?, -h, --help                                           Show help and usage information
